issues.description: SearchDeck action is incomplete. Missing required parameters: 'count' (look at 5 cards), 'maxReveal' (reveal up to 1), and 'filter' should specify {Donquixote Pirates} type, not cost-based filtering.
Missing Rest action for cost: 1 DON!! card + this Character must be rested as activation cost.
Missing action to place remaining 4 cards at bottom of deck in any order (deck ordering mechanic not represented).
Filter uses 'kind':'ByCost' which is incorrect. Should use 'kind':'ByType' with type:'Donquixote Pirates'.
